prompt: A nightclub entrance with several bouncers at the door, each wearing a name tag: NOT NULL (turning away an empty ghost), UNIQUE (checking IDs against a list), CHECK (holding a measuring tape), PRIMARY KEY (wearing a VIP badge), DEFAULT (handing a visitor a default name tag).
full_prompt: editorial illustration for a programming textbook. A nightclub entrance with several bouncers at the door, each wearing a name tag: NOT NULL (turning away an empty ghost), UNIQUE (checking IDs against a list), CHECK (holding a measuring tape), PRIMARY KEY (wearing a VIP badge), DEFAULT (handing a visitor a default name tag). Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational. Simple and clear. White background. Minimal or no text in the image.
